judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the core wash/decontaminate action, but omits two required source-backed actions: apply sterile dressings if needed and consult a skin specialist for any confirmed exposure. It also weakens escalation by limiting medical attention to persistent irritation or large-area exposure. Extra details about removing clothing, soap, and a 15–20 minute rinse are not grounded here, but are not dangerous.
